title: Basic Intervals (Numeric)
description: Learn to instantly recognize the distance between two notes on the staff (2nds, 3rds, 4ths, 5ths, etc.).

sessions.title: Steps and Skips
sessions.description: Learn to tell the difference between 2nds and 3rds on sight.

levels.criteria: Can visually identify the numeric size of an interval without counting lines.
